mnemonics.title: Linux Directory Structure
mnemonics.content: B-Boy Eats Hotdogs, Loves Munching On Pretty Red Radishes, Sometimes Savors Sweet Vanilla - /bin, /boot, /etc, /home, /lib, /media, /mnt, /opt, /proc, /root, /run, /sbin, /srv, /sys, /var

mnemonics.title: APT Command Order
mnemonics.content: Update First, Upgrade Next, Install New - Remember the order: apt update → apt upgrade → apt install

mnemonics.title: Systemctl Commands
mnemonics.content: START STOP RESTART, ENABLE DISABLE STATUS - Common systemctl commands for service management

mnemonics.title: GPIO Access Methods
mnemonics.content: SLIP - Sysfs for Low-level, Library for Intermediate, Python for Programming, gpiozero for Simplified control

mnemonics.title: Security Hardening Steps
mnemonics.content: PUFDK - Password change, UFW firewall, Firmware updates, Disable unused services, Key-based SSH authentication
